name: list_uploaded_files
description: Lists all files uploaded to the SAJHA uploads folder. Returns filename, full path, file type, size, and upload time. Call this before any read_pdf / read_docx / read_excel call to get the correct file path. Also call when user mentions 'the file I uploaded' or asks to analyse an uploaded document.

file_type.description: Filter by file type. Default: all.

sort_by.description: Sort order. Default: uploaded_at descending (newest first).
